module_info.docstring: Tests for the promotion journal (WAL-style atomicity).

functions.name: test_journal_creates_file
functions.docstring: Journal file is created on first write.

functions.name: test_journal_records_pending
functions.docstring: Pending entries are recorded with correct status.

functions.name: test_journal_marks_committed
functions.docstring: After promotion write succeeds, entry is marked committed.

functions.name: test_journal_marks_pruned
functions.docstring: After prune succeeds, entry is marked pruned (complete).

functions.name: test_record_demoted
functions.docstring: Demoted status is accepted and persisted.

functions.name: test_get_unresolved_demotions_excludes_committed
functions.docstring: Committed demotions are not returned as unresolved.

functions.name: test_mark_demotion_committed
functions.docstring: Demotion committed pairs with the demoted entry.
